prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, warm wood interior, Natsu Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in a short guild cloak and reinforced leather armor, stands opposite Natsu Ironleaf, a feminine healer in cream and mint robes. Natsu Ashbell presents a sealed quest parcel to Natsu Ironleaf with both hands, visible handoff motion, lively guild background, warm lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild hall shot, Natsu Ironleaf accepts the sealed parcel from Natsu Ashbell, both characters bow slightly to complete the handoff, consistent warm anime RPG lighting, no text, no watermark.
